issues.title: solc-version
issues.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (contract.sol#2)
issues.filename:

It is used by:

issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: too-many-digits
issues.description:
ERC20Token.constructor() (contract.sol#12-15) uses literals with too many digits:
	- totalSupply = 1000000 (contract.sol#14)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: immutable-states
issues.description: ERC20Token.totalSupply (contract.sol#6) should be immutable
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.description: Explicitly mark visibility of state
